zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Throckmorton II於大約1231年出生在英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓時，他的父親Adam de Throckmerton20歲，母親Matilda de Derinstone20歲。他於大約1250年與Prudence de Compton在英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1306年在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特塞頓 亞特 霍恩聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Throckmorton II was born about 1231, in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England, his father, Adam de Throckmerton, was 20 and his mother, Matilda de Derinstone, was 20. He married Prudence de Compton about 1250, in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1306, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Saint John the Baptist Churchyard, Sutton at Hone, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Prudence de Compton environ 1250, à Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1306, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Saint John the Baptist Churchyard, Sutton at Hone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Throckmorton II(이)가 대략 1231년 영국 워스스터실르 스록모르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Throckmerton(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Derinstone(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 영국 워스스터실르 스록모르턴에서 Prudence de Compton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1306년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 수턴 앳 호니 세인트 존 테 바프티스트 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Throckmorton II nasceu aproximadamente 1231, em Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Throckmerton, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Derinstone, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Prudence de Compton aproximadamente 1250, em Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Throckmorton II родился около 1231 г. в местности троккмортон, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam de Throckmerton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Derinstone, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Prudence de Compton около 1250 г. в местности троккмортон, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1306 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт джон т баптист чурчярд, суттон ат хоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
